dev_summary: Admin's latest commits have focused on enhancing tool management and service discovery.  A robust inter-tool service contract system with capability gateway is now integrated, allowing tools to expose and consume services via typed contracts. Auto-installation of tool hooks on scaffold and discover has been implemented, alongside a new dev-status.json for LLM-generated summaries and next steps, significantly streamlining tool creation and management. The addition of Tantu as a first-class tool further expands Admin's capabilities.
next_steps: Implement detailed logging within the `electron/main.js` for all service calls to aid debugging.
Develop a more sophisticated UI for managing service contracts, allowing users to easily define input/output schemas.
Refactor the `events:publish` mechanism to improve performance and scalability, particularly for high-volume event streams.
